subcodes.first_line: O Iskandar! The tongue of the Wronged One hath, throughout the nights and days, called out with this blessed verse: "Verily, there is no God..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسکندر لسان مظلوم در لیالی و ایام بایة مبارکه انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for nearness to God, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
